name: agent-atlas-cli
description: Scans your AI coding setup and turns it into an interactive mind map — see what your agents and skills are good at, what you never use, and what's missing. Read-only, local-only.
author: Alfred Emmanuel <alfredemmanuelinyang@gmail.com>

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/renderer/assets && cp src/renderer/assets/app.js src/renderer/assets/style.css dist/renderer/assets/
